channel.title: Urban Climate Research Digest
channel.description: Urban Climate Research Podcast for Personal Use
channel.itunes:author: sy4232

item.title: 2026-06-17 のダイジェスト：Impact of sky view factor on multimodal ほか2本
item.description: 今回の論文： ・[新着] Impact of sky view factor on multimodal physiological responses: integrating EEG, heart rate, and thermal sensation in urban landscapes ・[新着] Integrating airborne laser scanning and hydrological modelling to quantify landscape controls on evapotranspiration in anthropogenic environments ・[新着] A local terrain smoothing approach for stabilizing microscale and high-resolution mesoscale simulations: a case study using FastEddy® (v3.0) and WRF (v4.6.0)

item.title: 2026-06-17 のダイジェスト：Identifying Spatial Heterogeneity in LCZ ほか2本
item.description: 今回の論文： ・[新着] Identifying Spatial Heterogeneity in LCZ Impacts on SUHII and Corresponding Planning Strategies Using Coupled Spatial Autocorrelation and GWR Models: A Case Study of Berlin ・[新着] Area-adjusted influence of built-up pattern on urban land surface temperature in an arid landscape ・[新着] Urban ponds as nature-based solutions for heat mitigation and temperature regulation in highly urbanised regions

item.title: 2026-06-16 のダイジェスト：A Methodological Framework for Blockchai ほか1本
item.description: 今回の論文： ・A Methodological Framework for Blockchain-Enabled Peer-to-Peer Solar Trading to Mitigate Urban Heat Islands: A Lagos, Togo Case Study (2021–2026) ・A Methodological Framework for Blockchain-Enabled Peer-to-Peer Solar Trading to Mitigate Urban Heat Islands: A Lagos, Togo Case Study (2021–2026)
